# HIDDeviceClient.Notification.deviceSeized

**Case**

A notification that the device was seized by another client.

## Declaration

```swift
case deviceSeized
```

## Discussion

After the device is seized by another client, notifications are paused until [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/Notification/deviceUnseized] is received.
title: HIDDeviceClient.Notification.deviceSeized
